rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE KRIDER REVOCABLE TRUST DATED OCTOBER 28, 1994 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition To Appoint Successor Trustee; Declaration Of Christian Huff; Declaration Of Nathan Huff; Declaration Of Elizabeth Renfro; Declaration Of
rulings.Rulings: Continued to June 3, 2014. The supplement filed is an amendment to the petition as it states a later document is actually the operative document. The pleading must be re-filed and re-titled as an amendment to the petition. In addition, petitioner is seeking to be appointed as a fiduciary in this proceeding. He must sign and verify the amendment. The exception allowing an attorney to verify on behalf of a client does not apply when the client is seeking appointment as a fiduciary (CRC 7.103(c)).
